hooks.name: session-start
hooks.description: Welcome message with agent/skill count on session start

hooks.name: pre-bash
hooks.description: Block dangerous bash commands (rm -rf /, force push, drop database)

hooks.name: pre-write
hooks.description: Warn about writing to protected files (.env, secrets, production configs)

hooks.name: session-learn
hooks.description: Extract learnings and append to session log on session end
